name: SCENARIO #4.2: Verify that if hover tooltip icon in each taxi tariff card - the tooltip with taxi tariff name and description is displayed.

statusDetails.message: XPASS Legacy bug for incorrect description for "Сонный" and "Разговорчивый" taxi tariffs.

steps.name: Fill in the "From" and "Where" field: from "'Хамовнический вал, 34'" to "'Зубовский бульвар, 37'".
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Хамовнический Вал, 18"]') with value: 'Хамовнический вал, 34'.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]').
Fill the input field ('xpath', '//input[@placeholder="Льва Толстого, 16"]') with value: 'Зубовский бульвар, 37'.
Click on the "Fast" tab in the route section.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[text()="Быстрый"]').
Click on the "Get TAXI" button.
Wait until the element is clickable: ('xpath', '//button[text()="Вызвать такси"]').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//button[text()="Вызвать такси"]').
Click on taxi tariff.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Отпускной"]/parent::div').
Click on element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard-title" and text()="Отпускной"]/parent::div').
Hover over taxi tariff tooltip icon.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//ymaps[@class="ymaps-2-1-79-placemark-overlay ymaps-2-1-79-user-selection-none"]').
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard active"]/button[@data-for="tariff-card-2"]').
Hover over element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard active"]/button[@data-for="tariff-card-2"]').
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="tcard active"]/button[@data-for="tariff-card-2"]').
Verify that tariff tooltip is displayed.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@id="tariff-card-2" and contains(@class, "show")]').
Check the taxi tariff name in the tooltip.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="i-title" and contains(text(), "Отпускной")]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="i-title" and contains(text(), "Отпускной")]').
Check the taxi tariff description in the tooltip.
Wait until the element is displayed: ('xpath', '//div[@class="i-title" and contains(text(), "Отпускной")]/following-sibling::div[@class="i-dPrefix"]').
Get text of the element: ('xpath', '//div[@class="i-title" and contains(text(), "Отпускной")]/following-sibling::div[@class="i-dPrefix"]').

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(reason='Legacy bug for incorrect description for "Сонный" and "Разговорчивый" taxi tariffs.')
